title: Load Unit Type
description: Physical definition of a load unit (pallet, container, carton) that can be referenced by movement_rules and replenishment_strategies.

dimensions.description: Footprint/height of the empty carrier itself (e.g. an empty pallet's own height), used for geometric fit checks against storage_type.default_attributes.size.

volume.description: Nominal loaded volume of this load unit type (carrier + typical goods on it), e.g. '0.55m3' - not width*depth*height of 'dimensions', since that only covers the empty carrier's own footprint/height. Used together with storage_type.default_attributes.capacity_volume for simple cube-sum capacity checks.
